channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: ‘Michael’ Surpasses ‘Bohemian Rhapsody’ As Highest-Grossing Biopic of All Time
item.description: 🎤🎸 Rock on! 'Michael' now reigns as the ultimate biopic champ, surpassing 'Bohemian Rhapsody'! 🌟 #MusicMilestone #BiopicBreakdown

item.title: The Tullamarines Cover of Fleetwood Mac’s ‘The Chain’ for ‘Like A Version’ Debut
item.description: 🎶 The Tullamarines put their spin on Fleetwood Mac’s ‘The Chain’ for a ‘Like A Version’ debut! Press play and vibe with us! 🤩 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: SPIN Canada June Cover Story: Juno-Winning Palestinian-Canadian Singer Nemahsis Finds Allies and Fellow ‘Freaks’ With Her Intimate Songs of Alienation
item.description: 🎤 Dive into the unique world of Nemahsis and her Juno-winning music journey! 🌟 #CanadaMusicScene #JunoWinner #Nemahsis

item.title: Mickey Guyton Performs National Anthem at NBA Finals Game 5
item.description: 🎤 Mickey Guyton slays the National Anthem at the NBA Finals Game 5! 🏀🎶 #GirlPower #MickeyMagic

item.title: BTS Will Break Down Their Song Lyrics and Favorite Korean Dishes in Upcoming Book Releases
item.description: 📚🎶 Get ready to dive deep with @BTS_twt as they spill the tea on lyrics and yummy Korean dishes in their new books! 🍲💬 #BTS #NewRelease
